'''''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #46''' was one of many [[in-universe]] [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] issues published shortly before the release of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Attack of the Clones'']]. This issue was released [[March 7]], [[2002]]. It is also included in ''[[The Cestus Deception]]''. Its in-universe date is [[22 BBY/Legends|13:3:7]] [[Great ReSynchronization|GrS]].

==Contents==
*'''NEWS''':
**[[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] Sets [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Army Vote]] Date
**Army Vote Prompts [[Public Safety Commission|Chandrilan Public Safety]] Walk-out
**[[Skyroute D25D]] Detoured
**15 Dead in [[Houk/Legends|Houk]] / [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] Brawl at [[Eastport/Legends|Eastport]]

*'''BUSINESS''':
**[[Baktoid Armor Workshop/Legends|Baktoid]] Closes Down Five More Plants
**[[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom]] / [[Sublight Products Corporation|Subpro]] Development Deal Cancelled
**[[Lantillian ShipWrights/Legends|Lantillian]] Recalls [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|GX1 Short Hauler]]

*'''REGIONAL''':
**[[Sullustan]]s Elect [[Beolars Bribbs/Legends|President]]
**[[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] Bounty Posting Still A Mystery
**Riots Rock [[Kabal/Legends|Kabal]]
**[[Pergitor]] Coup Leaves Thousands Dead
**[[Merson pirates/Legends|Merson Pirates]] Attack [[Sy Myrth/Legends|Sy Myrth]] [[Passenger liner/Legends|Liner]]

*'''JEDI WATCH''':
**[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Refuse to Hand Over [["Baby Ludi" custody case|Baby Ludi]]

*'''SPORTS''':
**[[Deme Tryshyn|Tryshyn]] / [[Ardees/Legends|Ardees]] Deal Worth 3.1 Billion

*'''LIFE''':
**[[Annual Mid-Rim Domesticated Sub-Sentient Show|Best in Show]] Eaten by Second-Best
